title: Generic workflow benchmark result
description: Schema for result.json payloads produced by deterministic benchmark runners. The result payload records inputs, steps, outputs, metrics, and supporting citations for a single scenario run.

inputs.description: Inputs provided to the runner for this scenario (task, dataset snapshot, etc.).

steps.description: Ordered human-readable description of the steps the runner performed.

metrics.description: Numeric metrics for the run. Verdicts recorded here are descriptive only.

citations_or_paths.description: Paths or URLs supporting the recorded result.

runner_environment.description: Optional runtime environment metadata (host, Python version, etc.).
